{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/218-7-application-domains.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "7. Application Domains"
tags:
  * ingestion
  * architecture
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. 7. Application Domains


{quote}_Абстракт_ (авто){quote}
>
{quote}🎯 _Проблема:_ Application Domains !TIP Документ содержит практические рекомендации и лучшие практики.{quote}
{quote}🔧 _Подход:_ Burden addressed: Literature review, draft writing, methodology selection support, citation management, grant application drafting.{quote}
{quote}✅ _Результат:_ Significant healthcare provider adoption.{quote}
{quote}🏷️ _Ключевые слова:_ {{domains}}, {{application}}, {{deployment}}, {{practice}}, {{practitioners}}, {{burden}}, {{addressed}}, {{existing}}{quote}
>


{quote}[!TIP]{quote}
{quote}Документ содержит практические рекомендации и лучшие практики.{quote}




{quote}We identify nine professions or sub-professions where{quote}

----


h2. Содержание

* [7. Application Domains|#7-application-domains]
  * [7.1. K-12 Education|#71-k-12-education]
  * [7.2. Legal Practice (Sub-Specialties)|#72-legal-practice-sub-specialties]
  * [7.3. Medical Practice (Specific Specialties)|#73-medical-practice-specific-specialties]
  * [7.4. Social Work and Case Management|#74-social-work-and-case-management]
  * [7.5. Mental Health Care|#75-mental-health-care]
  * [7.6. Architecture and Engineering|#76-architecture-and-engineering]
  * [7.7. Accounting and Tax Practice|#77-accounting-and-tax-practice]
  * [7.8. Government Service Delivery|#78-government-service-delivery]
  * [7.9. Academic Research Support|#79-academic-research-support]

----






h2. 7. Application Domains

We identify nine professions or sub-professions where
Professional Colleague Agents are particularly applicable.
Order is by readiness — most ready first.

h3. 7.1. K-12 Education

_Practitioners_: Teachers, in all subjects and levels.
Approximately 70 million globally.

_Burden addressed_: Lesson planning, assignment generation,
grading, materials preparation, administrative documentation.

_Existing implementation_: «Обучай» (Russia), TeachAI tools
(global), Curipod (Norway/Europe). Multiple competing services
emerging.

_Maturity_: Active deployment. Tens of thousands to
millions of users globally.

_Critical mass for new entry_: High. Established players
exist. New entrants need clear differentiation.

h3. 7.2. Legal Practice (Sub-Specialties)

_Practitioners_: Lawyers, paralegals, legal advisors. By
sub-specialty: family law, criminal defense, immigration,
disability rights, social welfare.

_Burden addressed_: Document drafting (briefs, motions,
contracts), case research, statute lookup, deadline tracking.

_Existing implementation_: Harvey AI, CaseText, Lexis+ AI
(commercial, generalist). Limited specialized services.

_Maturity_: Beginning. Generalist tools exist; specialized
profession-specific colleagues nascent.

_Notable opportunity_: German social law / disability rights
(SGB IX, XII). Underserved by current commercial offerings.
Author's domain. (See Section 8.)

h3. 7.3. Medical Practice (Specific Specialties)

_Practitioners_: Physicians, particularly in primary care
and specific specialties (radiology, pathology, dermatology).

_Burden addressed_: Documentation, clinical note synthesis,
literature search, differential diagnosis support.

_Existing implementation_: Multiple commercial services
(Nuance DAX, Abridge, Suki, etc.). Hospital-integrated
deployments common.

_Maturity_: Rapid deployment in 2024-2026. Significant
healthcare provider adoption.

_Critical mass for new entry_: High. Major commercial
players. Specialized opportunities in underserved
sub-specialties.

h3. 7.4. Social Work and Case Management

_Practitioners_: Social workers, case managers, community
organizers, particularly in welfare systems.

_Burden addressed_: Client documentation, resource matching,
deadline tracking, regulatory compliance, communication
drafting.

_Existing implementation_: Limited. Some case management
software with AI features. No comprehensive Professional
Colleague Agent deployment.

_Maturity_: Significant opportunity. Underserved profession
serving vulnerable populations.

_Foundation alignment_: Strong. Diakonie, Caritas,
equivalent organizations are natural deployment partners.

h3. 7.5. Mental Health Care

_Practitioners_: Therapists, counselors, clinical psychologists.

_Burden addressed_: Session note synthesis, treatment
planning support, literature review, billing documentation.

_Existing implementation_: Emerging. Note-taking tools
appearing. Concerns about AI's role in therapeutic context
significant.

_Maturity_: Early. Ethical concerns slow deployment.
Privacy and clinical accuracy critical.

_Caution_: Mental health is high-sensitivity domain. Agent
must be deeply integrated with clinical safety frameworks.

h3. 7.6. Architecture and Engineering

_Practitioners_: Architects, civil engineers, structural
engineers.

_Burden addressed_: Code compliance checking, drawing
generation, calculation routines, regulatory navigation,
specification writing.

_Existing implementation_: Specialized software with AI
features. AutoCAD, Revit, others adding AI. Limited true
Professional Colleague Agents.

_Maturity_: Emerging. Significant opportunity for
profession-specific deployment.

h3. 7.7. Accounting and Tax Practice

_Practitioners_: Accountants, tax preparers, auditors.

_Burden addressed_: Document review, regulatory compliance,
calculation routines, audit preparation.

_Existing implementation_: Multiple commercial services
(Karbon, TaxAct AI, others). Active competitive market.

_Maturity_: Active. Profession evolving rapidly with AI
deployment.

h3. 7.8. Government Service Delivery

_Practitioners_: Civil servants in benefit determination,
licensing, immigration processing.

_Burden addressed_: Application review, eligibility
determination support, documentation, citizen communication
drafting.

_Existing implementation_: Limited and politically
sensitive. Government deployment of AI in citizen-facing
services raises significant concerns.

_Maturity_: Slow and contested. Important but careful
deployment required.

_Caveat_: This domain is particularly susceptible to
several risks — mediation collapse, bias, profession capture.
Especially careful design needed.

h3. 7.9. Academic Research Support

_Practitioners_: Researchers across disciplines.

_Burden addressed_: Literature review, draft writing,
methodology selection support, citation management, grant
application drafting.

_Existing implementation_: Multiple emerging services
(Elicit, Consensus, Scite). Active development.

_Maturity_: Active deployment. Researcher attitudes mixed.

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[143-6-four-deployment-domains]] (сходство 0.14)
* [[173-4-ten-domains-of-application]] (сходство 0.14)
* [[261-8-seven-domains-of-application]] (сходство 0.14)

* [[173-4-ten-domains-of-application|4. Ten Domains of Application]]
* [[261-8-seven-domains-of-application|8. Seven Domains of Application]]

h2. Упоминается в

* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]


h2. Связанные документы

* [[143-6-four-deployment-domains|6. Four Deployment Domains]] _17%_
* [[261-8-seven-domains-of-application|8. Seven Domains of Application]] _17%_
* [[276-the-two-layer-stack-as-it-exists|The Two-Layer Stack As It Exists]] _17%_
* [[277-what-s-missing-layer-b|What's Missing — Layer B]] _17%_
* [[280-the-specific-case-in-front-of-us|The Specific Case in Front of Us]] _17%_
* [[284-practical-recommendations-for-the-current-project|Practical Recommendations for the Current Project]] _17%_
